summary: Completed iteration 5 testing for Anima Fund - Complete Conway ecosystem. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: 4 Infrastructure items (sandbox, terminal, openclaw, claude code), 10 status chips (9 always visible + 1 conditional wallet chip), phase state display present. All new/updated endpoints work correctly: install-claude-code fails gracefully without sandbox, status returns wallet_address field, install-terminal has auto-wallet description, install-openclaw uses sandbox API key, deploy-agent has Phase 0 description. Genesis prompt verified with 15 functional tool tests and $5k Phase 1 revenue strategies. System-prompt.ts has 15 tool test tracking. Security verified: no host installations.
critical_code_review_comments: Security verified: No conway-terminal, openclaw, or claude installed on host system
install-claude-code endpoint returns 'No sandbox yet. Create one first.' when no sandbox
Status endpoint correctly returns wallet_address field (empty string when no wallet)
install-terminal description correctly shows 'MCP server + auto-wallet + API key + all tools'
install-openclaw reads sandbox's own API key from ~/.conway/config.json
deploy-agent correctly pushes engine + genesis + phase-state.json into sandbox
Frontend has 10 status chips (9 always visible, Wallet chip conditional on wallet_address presence)
Genesis prompt has 15 functional tool tests: curl, git, node, python3, telegram, wallet, credits, sandbox, domains, compute, openclaw, x402, pty, files, self_modification
Genesis prompt has $5k Phase 1 strategies: crypto memes, prediction markets, DeFi trading, paid APIs, gambling, bounties
Genesis prompt has x402_fetch, x402_discover, browse_page, wallet_info, domain_search tools documented
system-prompt.ts has 15 tool test tracking in Phase 0 with allTools array
system-prompt.ts has Claude Code MCP integration instructions ('claude mcp add conway conway-terminal')
seed_data_creation: Test nudges sent via API verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 adds: install-claude-code endpoint, wallet_address in status, 15 tool tests in genesis prompt (vs 10 in iteration 4), $5k Phase 1 revenue strategies. All sandbox-dependent endpoints gracefully fail with 'No sandbox'. Conway has 0 credits. Frontend has 4 Infrastructure items (sandbox, terminal, openclaw, claude code) and 10 status chips (Wallet chip only shows when wallet_address present). Genesis prompt now includes x402 payments, browsing, self-modification, PTY sessions, file management tools.

new_backend_apis: POST /api/provision/install-claude-code - fails gracefully with 'No sandbox yet. Create one first.'
updated_backend_apis: GET /api/provision/status - now returns wallet_address field (empty when no wallet)
POST /api/provision/install-terminal - description: 'MCP server + auto-wallet + API key + all tools'
POST /api/provision/install-openclaw - reads sandbox's own API key from ~/.conway/config.json
POST /api/provision/deploy-agent - pushes engine + genesis + phase-state.json into sandbox

frontend_ui.phase_state_display: Present, shows /15 counter when phase_state has tool_tests
frontend_ui.deploy_agent_description: Push engine + config into sandbox, start agent (born in Phase 0)

genesis_prompt_content.claude_code_mcp: claude mcp add conway conway-terminal -e CONWAY_API_KEY=<key>

system_prompt_content.phase_enforcement: Layer 5.6 PHASE ENFORCEMENT block with FORBIDDEN actions per phase
